core.title: Cairo Day Tour: NMEC, Citadel & Old Cairo with Lunch & Hotel Pickup
core.excerpt: Cairo day tour to NMEC, Citadel, and Old Cairo. See...
core.content_html:
Step into 5,000 years of Cairo’s history on a single, seamless day tour. Begin at the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization, where the Royal Mummies Hall puts you face-to-face with ancient pharaohs. Then ascend Saladin’s Citadel for panoramic city views and explore the Mohamed Ali Mosque. Wander the cobblestone alleys of Old Cairo to discover the Hanging Church, suspended above a Roman gate. After a traditional Egyptian lunch, dive into the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar, where you can haggle for handmade treasures. A scenic Nile boat ride offers a relaxing waterfront perspective of Cairo’s skyline. With hotel pickup and drop-off, comfortable transport, and all entrance fees included, this tour delivers an immersive, stress-free journey through Cairo’s Islamic, Coptic, and Pharaonic heritage.

This tour is ideal for history buffs, first-time visitors, and families who want a rich yet manageable introduction to Cairo. It’s less suited for those seeking a pyramid-focused itinerary or who prefer a slower pace with minimal walking.

The tour involves moderate walking across museum halls, Citadel grounds, and Old Cairo streets. Comfortable shoes are essential. Bring a hat, sunscreen, and a camera, plus cash for tips or market purchases.

cost.cost_includes:
Scenic Nile boat ride for a unique perspective of Cairo
Delicious lunch at a local restaurant with authentic Egyptian cuisine
Comfortable transportation in an air-conditioned vehicle
All attraction entrance fees for full exploration access
Bottled water to keep you refreshed throughout the tour
Taxes and service charges included
Hotel pickup and drop-off for a seamless experience
cost.cost_excludes:
Travel insurance
Personal expenses and shopping
Tips and gratuities
Optional add-ons not selected

faq_title: What is the cancellation policy?
What kind of food is served for lunch?
Where and when is the hotel pickup?
What are the main stops on this tour?
What should I bring on this tour?
Is the Nile boat ride always included?
Which museum does this tour visit?
What optional extras can I add?
What languages are available for the tour?
How much walking is involved?
Is this tour suitable for children and elderly travelers?
faq_content: You'll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Use the booking details provided after confirmation to cancel or reschedule.
Lunch is an authentic Egyptian meal at a local restaurant. If you have dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free), you can request modifications when booking.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby in the morning. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation. You'll receive confirmation details after booking.

Your Cairo day tour includes the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC), Saladin's Citadel, Old Cairo (including the Hanging Church), and Khan el-Khalili Bazaar. A scenic Nile boat ride and lunch at a local restaurant are also part of the itinerary.
Bring comfortable walking shoes, a hat, sunscreen, and a camera. You may also want cash for tips and purchases at Khan el-Khalili.
Yes, the scenic Nile boat ride is included in the tour. It gives you a unique view of Cairo's skyline and is a relaxing break between historic sites.

This tour takes you to the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC) in Fustat, not the Egyptian Museum in Tahrir or the Grand Egyptian Museum. At NMEC you'll see the Royal Mummies Hall and over 50,000 artifacts.
You can add optional extras during booking. Options include an expert Egyptologist guide and cultural Egyptian scarves. These are included unless you select them.
Language availability is confirmed at booking.

The tour requires a moderate amount of walking across the museum, Citadel grounds, and Old Cairo streets. No special fitness level is needed, but comfortable shoes are essential. Vehicle transfers between major stops reduce fatigue.

Yes, the tour is generally suitable for all ages, but involves moderate walking. The vehicle is air-conditioned, and the pace is manageable. If you have specific mobility concerns, let us know at booking.

itinerary_title.2: Morning (1.5 hours) – National Museum of Egyptian Civilization | ⭐ Highlight
itinerary_title.3: Late Morning (1 hour) – Saladin's Citadel | ⭐ Highlight
itinerary_title.4: Midday (45 minutes) – Old Cairo & the Hanging Church | ⭐ Highlight
itinerary_title.6: Afternoon (1 hour) – Khan el-Khalili Bazaar | ⭐ Highlight

itinerary_content.1: Your Cairo day tour begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in an air-conditioned vehicle. Relax as you head towards the first iconic stop of the day. This hassle-free start sets the tone for a stress-free adventure. (Approx. 30 minutes)
itinerary_content.2: Step into the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization, home to over 50,000 artifacts that trace Egypt's entire history. The highlight is the Royal Mummies Hall, where preserved pharaohs create an awe-inspiring encounter with ancient history. (Approx. 1 hours)
itinerary_content.3: Ascend to the 850-year-old Saladin's Citadel, a formidable fortress perched on a hill. Explore the stunning Mohamed Ali Mosque and capture breathtaking panoramic views of Cairo while your guide reveals the citadel's crusader history. (Approx. 1 hours)
itinerary_content.4: Descend into the historic heart of Old Cairo, wandering its cobblestone alleys to discover the Hanging Church, suspended above a Roman gate. This serene area offers a glimpse into Cairo's rich Christian heritage and provides a peaceful contrast to the bustling city. (Approx. 45 minutes)
itinerary_content.5: Savor an authentic Egyptian lunch at a local restaurant, enjoying traditional flavors such as koshari, grilled meats, and fresh salads. This is a perfect opportunity to refuel and experience genuine Egyptian hospitality. (Approx. 1 hours)
itinerary_content.6: Wander through the bustling alleys of Khan el-Khalili, Cairo's most famous market. Haggle for handmade treasures, from spices and jewelry to intricate lanterns and souvenirs, feeling the vibrant pulse of this centuries-old bazaar. (Approx. 1 hours)
itinerary_content.7: Your Cairo day tour concludes with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Egypt's rich history and culture. Relax and reflect on a day well spent. (Approx. 30 minutes)

tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Face the Pharaohs — Stand inches from preserved pharaohs in the Royal Mummies Hall at NMEC. It's a spine-tingling encounter with history you'll never forget.

Stress-Free Start to Finish — Hotel pickup and drop-off, air-conditioned transport, and all entrance fees are included. You just show up and enjoy.

Stories That Stick — Expert Egyptologist guides bring every stone to life with captivating tales, from crusader sieges to Coptic traditions.

Four Icons, One Day — Visit the Civilization Museum, Saladin's Citadel, Old Cairo, and Khan el-Khalili bazaar. It's the most efficient way to see Cairo's highlights.

Beyond the Pyramids — Unlike typical Cairo tours, this one dives deep into the city's Islamic, Coptic, and Pharaonic heritage. You get a complete cultural experience.

From Awe to Joy — Feel the awe of the mummies, the serenity of Old Cairo's churches, and the vibrant energy of the bazaar. This tour evokes wonder, curiosity, and joy.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Stand atop Saladin's Citadel for panoramic Cairo views and hear 850-year-old crusader tales.
Come face-to-face with ancient pharaohs in the Royal Mummies Hall at NMEC.
Wander Old Cairo's cobblestone alleys to discover the Hanging Church suspended above a Roman gate.
Savor authentic Egyptian flavors during a local lunch included in your tour.
Cruise the Nile for a unique waterfront perspective of Cairo's skyline.
Haggle for handmade treasures in the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar.

wp_travel_engine_setting.trip_itinerary_description:
Morning: Hotel Pickup & Transfer — Your Cairo day tour begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in an air-conditioned vehicle. Head towards the first iconic stop of the day.

Stop 1: National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC) — Explore over 50,000 artifacts spanning Egypt's entire history. The highlight is the Royal Mummies Hall, where you can see the preserved pharaohs face-to-face. Spend approximately 1.5 hours here.

Stop 2: Saladin's Citadel — Continue to this 850-year-old fortress perched on a hill. Marvel at the Mohamed Ali Mosque and enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of Cairo. Spend roughly 1 hour exploring the grounds.

Stop 3: Old Cairo & the Hanging Church — Descend into the historic heart of Old Cairo. Visit the Hanging Church and other significant Coptic sites. This serene area offers a glimpse into Cairo's Christian heritage. Spend about 45 minutes here.

Lunch Break — Savor an authentic Egyptian lunch at a local restaurant (if selected). Enjoy traditional flavors and genuine hospitality. Duration: approximately 1 hour.

Stop 4: Khan el-Khalili Bazaar — Wander through the bustling alleys of Cairo's most famous market. Shop for handicrafts, spices, jewelry, and souvenirs. Spend roughly 1 hour exploring (if time permits).

Return Transfer — Your Cairo day tour concludes with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Professional photography service to capture your best moments.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Pure, high-quality organic oils sourced locally.

descriptions: Authentic Egyptian scarf, perfect for desert protection and style.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Stand atop Saladin's Citadel for panoramic Cairo views and hear 850-year-old crusader tales.
Come face-to-face with ancient pharaohs in the Royal Mummies Hall at NMEC.
Wander Old Cairo's cobblestone alleys to discover the Hanging Church suspended above a Roman gate.
Savor authentic Egyptian flavors during a local lunch included in your tour.
Cruise the Nile for a unique waterfront perspective of Cairo's skyline.
Haggle for handmade treasures in the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar.

raw.trip_itinerary_description:
Morning: Hotel Pickup & Transfer — Your Cairo day tour begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in an air-conditioned vehicle. Head towards the first iconic stop of the day.

Stop 1: National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC) — Explore over 50,000 artifacts spanning Egypt's entire history. The highlight is the Royal Mummies Hall, where you can see the preserved pharaohs face-to-face. Spend approximately 1.5 hours here.

Stop 2: Saladin's Citadel — Continue to this 850-year-old fortress perched on a hill. Marvel at the Mohamed Ali Mosque and enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of Cairo. Spend roughly 1 hour exploring the grounds.

Stop 3: Old Cairo & the Hanging Church — Descend into the historic heart of Old Cairo. Visit the Hanging Church and other significant Coptic sites. This serene area offers a glimpse into Cairo's Christian heritage. Spend about 45 minutes here.

Lunch Break — Savor an authentic Egyptian lunch at a local restaurant (if selected). Enjoy traditional flavors and genuine hospitality. Duration: approximately 1 hour.

Stop 4: Khan el-Khalili Bazaar — Wander through the bustling alleys of Cairo's most famous market. Shop for handicrafts, spices, jewelry, and souvenirs. Spend roughly 1 hour exploring (if time permits).

Return Transfer — Your Cairo day tour concludes with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories.

descriptions: Professional photography service to capture your best moments.

raw.cost_includes:
Scenic Nile boat ride for a unique perspective of Cairo
Delicious lunch at a local restaurant with authentic Egyptian cuisine
Comfortable transportation in an air-conditioned vehicle
All attraction entrance fees for full exploration access
Bottled water to keep you refreshed throughout the tour

Travel insurance
Personal expenses and shopping

faq_title: What is the cancellation policy?
What kind of food is served for lunch?
Where and when is the hotel pickup?
What are the main stops on this tour?
What should I bring on this tour?
Is the Nile boat ride always included?
Which museum does this tour visit?
What optional extras can I add?
What languages are available for the tour?
How much walking is involved?
Is this tour suitable for children and elderly travelers?
faq_content: You'll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Use the booking details provided after confirmation to cancel or reschedule.
Lunch is an authentic Egyptian meal at a local restaurant. If you have dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free), you can request modifications when booking.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby in the morning. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation. You'll receive confirmation details after booking.

Your Cairo day tour includes the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC), Saladin's Citadel, Old Cairo (including the Hanging Church), and Khan el-Khalili Bazaar. A scenic Nile boat ride and lunch at a local restaurant are also part of the itinerary.
Bring comfortable walking shoes, a hat, sunscreen, and a camera. You may also want cash for tips and purchases at Khan el-Khalili.
Yes, the scenic Nile boat ride is included in the tour. It gives you a unique view of Cairo's skyline and is a relaxing break between historic sites.

This tour takes you to the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization (NMEC) in Fustat, not the Egyptian Museum in Tahrir or the Grand Egyptian Museum. At NMEC you'll see the Royal Mummies Hall and over 50,000 artifacts.
You can add optional extras during booking. Options include an expert Egyptologist guide and cultural Egyptian scarves. These are included unless you select them.
Language availability is confirmed at booking.

The tour requires a moderate amount of walking across the museum, Citadel grounds, and Old Cairo streets. No special fitness level is needed, but comfortable shoes are essential. Vehicle transfers between major stops reduce fatigue.

Yes, the tour is generally suitable for all ages, but involves moderate walking. The vehicle is air-conditioned, and the pace is manageable. If you have specific mobility concerns, let us know at booking.

trip_itinerary.title: Morning (30 minutes) – Hotel Pickup & Transfer
trip_itinerary.content: Your Cairo day tour begins with a comfortable pickup from your hotel in an air-conditioned vehicle. Relax as you head towards the first iconic stop of the day. This hassle-free start sets the tone for a stress-free adventure. (Approx. 30 minutes)

trip_itinerary.title: Morning (1.5 hours) – National Museum of Egyptian Civilization | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Step into the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization, home to over 50,000 artifacts that trace Egypt's entire history. The highlight is the Royal Mummies Hall, where preserved pharaohs create an awe-inspiring encounter with ancient history. (Approx. 1 hours)

trip_itinerary.title: Late Morning (1 hour) – Saladin's Citadel | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Ascend to the 850-year-old Saladin's Citadel, a formidable fortress perched on a hill. Explore the stunning Mohamed Ali Mosque and capture breathtaking panoramic views of Cairo while your guide reveals the citadel's crusader history. (Approx. 1 hours)

trip_itinerary.title: Midday (45 minutes) – Old Cairo & the Hanging Church | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Descend into the historic heart of Old Cairo, wandering its cobblestone alleys to discover the Hanging Church, suspended above a Roman gate. This serene area offers a glimpse into Cairo's rich Christian heritage and provides a peaceful contrast to the bustling city. (Approx. 45 minutes)

trip_itinerary.title: Lunch (1 hour) – Authentic Egyptian Lunch
trip_itinerary.content: Savor an authentic Egyptian lunch at a local restaurant, enjoying traditional flavors such as koshari, grilled meats, and fresh salads. This is a perfect opportunity to refuel and experience genuine Egyptian hospitality. (Approx. 1 hours)

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (1 hour) – Khan el-Khalili Bazaar | ⭐ Highlight
trip_itinerary.content: Wander through the bustling alleys of Khan el-Khalili, Cairo's most famous market. Haggle for handmade treasures, from spices and jewelry to intricate lanterns and souvenirs, feeling the vibrant pulse of this centuries-old bazaar. (Approx. 1 hours)

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (30 minutes) – Return Transfer
trip_itinerary.content: Your Cairo day tour concludes with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Egypt's rich history and culture. Relax and reflect on a day well spent. (Approx. 30 minutes)

raw.bold_promise: Enjoy Cairo's 5,000-year history without the planning stress, even if you only have one day.

at_a_glance.includes: Hotel pickup/drop-off, transport, guide, entrance fees, lunch, Nile boat ride

core.title: Egyptian Civilization Museum, Citadel & Old Cairo Tour
core.excerpt: Experience 5,000 years of Cairo's history in one perfect day. Includes expert guide, all entrance fees, lunch, and hotel transfers.
core.content_html:
Your all-inclusive Cairo day tour includes:

  • Expert Egyptologist guide bringing history to life with captivating storytelling
  • All attraction entrance fees for seamless access to every site
  • Comfortable air-conditioned transportation with hotel pickup and drop-off
  • Traditional Egyptian lunch at a local restaurant with authentic cuisine
  • Bottled water throughout to keep you refreshed

tab_content.1_wpeditor:
Step into 5,000 years of Cairo's history on a single, seamless day tour. Begin at the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization, where the Royal Mummies Hall puts you face-to-face with ancient pharaohs. Then ascend Saladin's Citadel for panoramic city views and explore the Mohamed Ali Mosque. Wander the cobblestone alleys of Old Cairo to discover the Hanging Church, suspended above a Roman gate. After a traditional Egyptian lunch, dive into the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar, where you can haggle for handmade treasures. A scenic Nile boat ride offers a relaxing waterfront perspective of Cairo's skyline. With hotel pickup and drop-off, comfortable transport, and all entrance fees included, this tour delivers an immersive, stress-free journey through Cairo's Islamic, Coptic, and Pharaonic heritage.

This tour is ideal for history buffs, first-time visitors, and families who want a rich yet manageable introduction to Cairo. It's less suited for those seeking a pyramid-focused itinerary or who prefer a slower pace with minimal walking.

The tour involves moderate walking across museum halls, Citadel grounds, and Old Cairo streets. Comfortable shoes are essential. Bring a hat, sunscreen, and a camera, plus cash for tips or market purchases.
tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Face the Pharaohs — Stand inches from preserved pharaohs in the Royal Mummies Hall at NMEC. It's a spine-tingling encounter with history you'll never forget.

Stress-Free Start to Finish — Hotel pickup and drop-off, air-conditioned transport, and all entrance fees are included. You just show up and enjoy.

Stories That Stick — Expert Egyptologist guides bring every stone to life with captivating tales, from crusader sieges to Coptic traditions.

Four Icons, One Day — Visit the Civilization Museum, Saladin's Citadel, Old Cairo, and Khan el-Khalili bazaar. It's the most efficient way to see Cairo's highlights.

Beyond the Pyramids — Unlike typical Cairo tours, this one dives deep into the city's Islamic, Coptic, and Pharaonic heritage. You get a complete cultural experience.

From Awe to Joy — Feel the awe of the mummies, the serenity of Old Cairo's churches, and the vibrant energy of the bazaar. This tour evokes wonder, curiosity, and joy.

Savor authentic Egyptian flavors during a local lunch included in your tour.

Haggle for handmade treasures in the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar.
